description_long: This is a modern, floor-mounted toilet with a rectangular cistern and a rounded, elongated bowl. The toilet is predominantly white with a smooth, glossy ceramic finish, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. The cistern is integrated with the bowl, and a flush button is visible on the top of the tank. The seat is present and matches the overall design, sitting flush with the bowl. The base is solid and extends to the floor, providing stability and a seamless look. There are no visible accessibility features or additional attachments.
description: A sleek, white floor-mounted toilet with a rectangular cistern, rounded bowl, and visible flush button, featuring a smooth, glossy ceramic finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated bowl, rectangular cistern, and the flush button on top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded bowl, seamless seat, and the full width of the cistern.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the bowl and cistern profile.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full rectangular cistern and the solid base extending to the floor.
